problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization may resolve How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
